creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Vadim,

The problem mentioned in the PR seems like the problem with configuration of
ctrlproxy on your host, and not with the port.

Could you please check if the directory mentioned in "logfile" key of
ctrlproxy's configuration file for the user, is present on the host ?

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
Sent from my Emacs
